passiveAbilities.name: The Faculty
passiveAbilities.description: If Old Polly, Prof. Boffinsworth and Flinders Memphis were taken in this troupe at the start of the game, this character gains Rogue, Animal and Machine Keywords

passiveAbilities.name: Prognosication
passiveAbilities.description: Friendly Rogues within 4" gain [Seen It All Before: If this character is attacker or defender in a round of Melee, before each player selects a Melee Card, your opponent must reveal their hand]

passiveAbilities.name: Cockatrice Companion
passiveAbilities.description: When targetting an enemy character that has no energy with a Melee Attack or Petrifying Gaze action, increase any Dmg dealt by +1.

activeAbilities.name: Wily Old Weasel
activeAbilities.description: If a friendly Rogue takes an Arcane action within 6" you may reduce its energy cost by -1.

arcaneAbilities.name: Petrifying Gaze
arcaneAbilities.description:
Taget suffers X Magical Dmg then loses X energy
Catastrophe: This character suffers 3 Wds

signatureMove.name: Cockatrice Stare
signatureMove.endStepEffect: This may deal Dmg to characters outside Melee Range. If the enemy suffered 1 or more Wds during this round of melee, they must discard 1 energy.
